statement: A simply supported beam AC has a pin at A (x=0) and a roller at C (x=6 m). A point load of 900 N acts downward at B (x=2 m from A). The beam is weightless. Find the reactions at A and C.
common_student_errors: Placing the load at the midpoint instead of at x=2 m when computing moments
Omitting Ax from the FBD because there is no horizontal applied load
Dividing the load equally between A and C without using moment equilibrium
